title: cassia lucens var. tenuifolia
intro: Cassia lucens var. tenuifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Senna or Cassia, is a plant species in the legume family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Cassia lucens var. tenuifolia include its ability to act as a laxative and purgative, making it useful for treating constipation and other digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Cassia lucens var. tenuifolia is typically prepared as a tea or capsule for its medicinal purposes, and its leaves and pods are also used in herbal remedies.
